About Us

We help leaders transform organizations
to empower society

Management Innovations helps founders, CEOs, and leadership teams build the leadership, culture, strategy, and execution capability required for extraordinary growth and lasting relevance.

We serve leaders and their teams across industries — bringing world-class OD frameworks, executive coaching, and leadership development to organizations ready to make the leap from good to extraordinary.

Our role is to challenge assumptions, sharpen perspective, and stay close to the journey until the intended shift begins to take root across the organization.

"Real transformation begins when leadership, culture, strategy, and execution start reinforcing one another."

— Core philosophy, Management Innovations
Our Foundations

What we stand for

01
Commitment to Client Success
We measure ourselves by the quality of client outcomes, not the quantity of activity. The work matters only when it creates visible progress for the client.
02
World-Class Methodology
Our work draws from Theory U, Balanced Scorecard, competitive strategy, systems thinking, first-principle thinking, and Manoj Onkar's work in talent partnership and implementation.
03
Co-Creation Over Prescription
We do not arrive with prefabricated answers. We work with accomplished leaders to help them see new possibilities, make stronger choices, and co-create the path forward.
04
From Vision to Implementation
Vision, strategy, culture, and execution must reinforce one another. We stay close to the leadership journey until ideas begin to translate into practice.
Practice Areas

The 8 Pillars of
Organization Development

Our eight practice areas form an integrated system — each pillar reinforces the others, creating conditions for truly extraordinary organizations.

01
Leadership Transformation
Shift from ego-centric to eco-centric leadership — from directing to co-creating an extraordinary collective future.
02
Culture Transformation
Culture is the secret weapon. We help you deliberately design and embed the culture that makes extraordinary things happen.
03
Massive Transformative Purpose
Why will people bring their head, heart and soul? We help you discover a purpose that truly inspires commitment.
04
Breakthrough Competitive Strategy
Build the strategy that makes your organization look unique in the eyes of target customers — sustainable competitive advantage.
05
Strategy Execution
Strategy without execution is aimless. Translate strategic intent into aligned action so teams stop pulling in different directions and start playing one common game.
06
Talent Partnership
Build systems for attracting, developing, and retaining exceptional talent to fuel your organization's extraordinary future.
07
Sales Transformation
Transform your sales culture from transactional to consultative — creating sustainable growth through mindset and skill shifts.
08
Innovation Culture
Embed the mindset, systems, and habits that make continuous innovation part of your organization's everyday DNA.
How Leaders Engage

A clear path from insight to implementation

Most leaders do not need more disconnected ideas. They need a progression that helps them see differently, act together, and sustain the shift. This is how many leaders typically engage with Management Innovations.

Step 01

Begin with a shift in perspective

The CFRO Workshop helps leaders step out of reactive management, listen more deeply, and see the organization with fresh eyes.

Explore the CFRO Workshop
Step 02

Go deeper through a rigorous flagship journey

ODeX integrates leadership, culture, strategy, execution, and talent into one six-month process for leaders building the next version of their organization.

Explore ODeX
Step 03

Continue through an active community

Beyond the formal program, leaders stay connected through an alumni network that supports reflection, exchange, and continued implementation.

See the Alumni Network

Alpesh Gandhi

Managing Director, Ami Polymers

A concise leadership perspective on the ODeX journey, its quality, and the strategic value it created for reflection, alignment, and execution.

► Watch on YouTube
Video Testimonial

Naveen Sharma

Founder, Auto Sherpa

A founder's perspective on how ODeX challenged assumptions, opened new possibilities, and strengthened the way leadership can shape organizational growth.

“

Thank you for the ODeX program. What made it truly distinctive was that it didn't feel like a module we studied. It was leadership practiced in real time. The live exercises, stakeholder interviews, empathy walks, role plays, and case clinics forced me to step out of my assumptions. They made me deal with reality rather than my interpretation of it. Your emphasis on accepting 'I'm not a good listener' as the starting point was uncomfortable but incredibly effective. I also valued the leadership habits you pushed us toward. Viewing leadership as service to stakeholders is something I now feel daily. I strongly recommend your program to any leader who wants measurable improvement in listening, collaboration and execution.

Naveen Sharma
Founder & CEO
“

Our group's founding team, including myself, recently completed the ODeX program that started in January, expertly designed and led by Mr. Manoj Onkar. This program is, without a doubt, a game-changer for leaders and founders aiming to cultivate extraordinary organizations. Manoj's definition of 'extraordinary'—future-ready, people-centric (head, heart, and soul), and a positive societal force—resonated deeply, and the program delivered on every count. Manoj's training on a curated suite of widely accepted management technologies provided a clear roadmap. Many of these concepts were revelatory, offering practical insights we immediately saw ourselves implementing. These skills and concepts covered Leadership, Culture Transformation, Strategy, Execution & Talent Partnership. His highly engaging, effective, and exercise-based approach ensures that these aren't just theories, but actionable skills for senior leaders. One can literally see perspectives changing and change getting deployed in the organisation during the course of the program. The program's impact was so significant that we've since enrolled a substantial group of 15 leaders and functional heads across our company in the April 2025 cohort. I strongly endorse the ODeX program for all founders and leaders of organisations who are committed to building truly exceptional organizations.

Chetan Khosla
Chairman & Founder
“

I had the opportunity to undergo the ODEX program training facilitated by Mr. Manoj Onkar. It proved to be a highly valuable learning experience. The training was well structured, practical, and very impactful. The program strengthened my understanding and provided practical tools that can be effectively applied in our professional roles. Members of the leadership team from my organization also participated in the training. We have collectively observed positive improvements in our professional approach as well as in personal effectiveness.

Rudrappa Mirekar
CEO
“

Happy to share that I recently completed the ODeX program organized by Manoj Onkar of MANAGEMENT INNOVATIONS. This six-month journey was transformative. It pushed boundaries and challenged our assumptions. The program delved deep into Deep Listening, the bedrock of strategic thinking. It explored principles like Theory U, Exponential Organizations, and the 5 Choices Framework of AG Lafley. The interactive and experiential approach focused on actionable implementation roadmaps. The power of listening without judgment has profoundly impacted my perspective. I highly recommend this course to anyone willing to apply strategic thinking to change the world for the better.

Arindam Ghosh
CEO
“

The founders and key managers in our organization have participated in sessions conducted by Mr. Manoj Onkar. These sessions have been immensely valuable. They have driven immediate and meaningful shifts in alignment and collaboration. This impact is visible not only within our leadership team but also in how we engage with customers and supplier partners. On a personal note, the experience has helped me sharpen my focus and sense of purpose.

Vishwanath Mosale
Co Founder & Sr. VP, Head of Strategy
“

The ODeX Programme has been a life-transforming experience. I am able to see the shift in my thinking and execution. The impact and lens to operate as an organization is completely different. The program influences communication, customers, processes, strategy and stakeholders. The tools provided are thoroughly justified. The ODeX Learning Program is interactive and supports inclusive growth. It helps create a massive purpose to sustain the universe and individuals.

Surender Singh
Founder
“

I have attended multiple workshops and training programs led by Manoj Onkar. Each experience reinforced his reputation as a world-class trainer and OD consultant. Manoj has a unique ability to engage participants of all levels. He creates a learning environment that is stimulating and supportive. His sessions combine theory, exercises and real-life examples. Beyond technical expertise, Manoj inspires growth, self-awareness and confidence. Participants develop a mindset geared toward continuous improvement.

Alpesh Gandhi
Managing Director
“

This training program was a truly transformative experience. It helped both personally and professionally. The program goes beyond conventional learning. It focuses on mindset, leadership behaviour and practical execution. The emphasis on self-awareness helped me reflect deeply on my leadership style. I highly recommend this program to leaders seeking meaningful change.

Manoj Mani
Sr. Learning Professional
“

This ODeX program is one of its kind. It gave me an opportunity to practice learning while the course progressed. The coaching and mentoring from the faculty is immense. The group dynamics is phenomenal. The program challenges the status quo. It gives participants the opportunity to apply the learning directly with clients. It is a must-do program for serious OD professionals.

Adesh Gothi
Co Founder
“

I joined this programme to understand basic foundations of organisation development and how to implement the same beyond theory and concepts. It’s been 4.5 months now and I am delighted to share that whatever I have learnt so far, I was able to implement the same real time with my fellow participants, at my current workplace and at my other voluntary associations. Some of the tools like deep listening, empathy walks, stakeholder interviews, 5 Choice Framework, Case Clinics are very powerful and independent of sector, size, stage of organization.

Vandana Bhansali
HR Head

Step One | CFRO Workshop

Creating Future Ready Organizations through Theory U, leadership, strategy, and culture

For many leaders, this is the first deep shift: stepping out of reactive management, learning to see the system more clearly, and building the inner capacity required for stronger strategy, culture, and execution.

May 23-24, 2026

Cross the threshold from current management limits to future-ready leadership

Grounded in Dr. Otto Scharmer's Theory U from MIT Sloan and adapted for live organizational realities, this workshop helps leaders move from symptom thinking to systems thinking, from reactive management to deeper sensing, and from fragmented effort to co-created execution.

Date and Time
May 23 and 24, 2026 | 8:00 AM to 4:00 PM
Format
Online interactive workshop with live faculty facilitation
Ideal For
Senior decision-makers shaping culture, strategy, and execution
View Workshop Brochure See Participant Voices

For many leadership teams, this workshop becomes the entry point to deeper work in leadership transformation, culture, strategy, execution, and, where relevant, the ODeX journey.

01
Leadership Lens Shift
Shift from reactive leadership to deeper listening, sensing, and more conscious collective action.
02
Culture Diagnosis
Identify the non-productive patterns in teams and culture that silently block growth and execution.
03
Strategy Reframing
Move from symptom fixes to systems thinking so strategic choices become clearer and more coherent.
04
Execution Roadmap
Leave with practical frameworks, conversational tools, and clearer next steps for implementation.

Facilitated by Manoj Onkar and senior transformation faculty

The workshop blends reflection, frameworks, dialogue, and practical application for leaders working on real organizational challenges.

Blueprint of Emergence

How the workshop translates Theory U into practical leadership work

This visual brings the core workshop practices into one integrated view: deep listening, empathy walks, stakeholder interviews, case clinic, the shift from ego to eco, movement from symptoms to source, and learning from the emerging future.

Deep Listening

Move from surface-level conversation to attention that reveals what is really shaping people, teams, and decisions.

Empathy Walks

Step into stakeholder realities and build sharper understanding before making strategic choices or interventions.

Case Clinic

Use collective intelligence to reframe live challenges and discover possibilities leaders often miss on their own.

Ego to Eco

Shift from narrow functional thinking toward leadership that serves the larger organizational ecosystem.

Symptoms to Source

Stop reacting only to visible problems and learn to identify the deeper structures creating repeated outcomes.

Emerging Future

Build the discipline to sense what wants to emerge and translate that into aligned experiments and action.

Theory U In Practice

Crossing the threshold into the field of future

A practical visual of the leadership shift required to move beyond inherited patterns, sense the system more deeply, clarify intention, and bring new thinking into aligned action.

Theory U Visual

The Theory U journey from sensing to co-creating

The Theory U journey gives leaders a disciplined pathway to observe more clearly, connect to emerging possibilities, and translate insight into coordinated execution.

What this workshop unlocks

This workshop is designed to help leaders address the subtle blind spots that keep organizations stuck in repetition, politics, and fragmented execution.

Deep Listening

Hear what teams, stakeholders, and systems are really saying beneath the noise.

Fresh Perspective

Break habitual thinking patterns and look at strategy, culture, and leadership differently.

Cultural Transformation

See how attention, conversation quality, and leadership stance shape culture every day.

Better Decisions

Improve decision quality by moving from symptoms toward deeper systemic understanding.

Co-Creation

Build stronger commitment by involving people more meaningfully instead of prescribing solutions.

Higher Consciousness

Reconnect strategy and execution with purpose so people bring more head, heart, and soul.

About Theory U

Theory U was developed by Dr. Otto Scharmer at MIT Sloan and has influenced leadership and change work globally. It invites leaders to move through a U-shaped journey of co-initiating, co-sensing, presencing, co-creating, and co-evolving.

In practical terms, that means learning to pause, perceive reality more fully, connect to emerging future possibilities, and act from a wiser center. This workshop uses that spirit in a practical way for organizations that need stronger relationships, clearer strategy, and more aligned execution.

Foundational Books

The workshop draws from core Theory U literature including Theory U, Leading from the Emerging Future, and related practical applications.

Global Practice

Theory U has shaped practitioners, institutions, and client organizations across business, civil society, education, and social impact ecosystems worldwide.

Workshop Snapshot

A short visual snapshot from the workshop journey. This clip does not include spoken audio.

"If you listen to people from the heart, you get to know a lot many things and can transform organizations better."
Harshal Shah
Founder & Director
"The culture shift is: when you face a problem, park your reaction, think with a peaceful mind, and you arrive at a better solution."
Sanjay Chaturvedi
VP Sales
"During the case clinic journey, I understood that my problems are not the actual problem. You can solve them in a different way."
Rasesh Jani
Industry Professional
"Until now if someone spoke, we would keep going without listening. After this program, being silent, thinking, and then replying, this is a very big thing."
Mahendra Kumar Yadav
Founder & Director
"My patience improved and my ability to sense new possibilities that want to emerge has expanded. By letting go of fear, I am open to new ideas and taking actions in those areas."
Sai Krishna Rao
Head - Education Initiative
"I apply insights from the emerging future in my decisions and the results are extraordinary. My relationship with my team, clients, and family is at a totally different level."
Sanjay Kumar
Entrepreneur & IT Company Founder
"It is nothing about me as ego, it is completely eco. Even today the dialysis unit holds the space of healing. Patients come and get treated despite everything around it."
Usha Kulkarni
Healthcare Leader
"I feel limitless right now. My boundaries opened up. The moment I opened up, I became resourceful to feed Kenyan refugees. Every week about 300 people get food, clothes, and dignity."
Jayeshri Kunju
Chartered Accountant & CEO
"The greatest impact was on conversations. Levels of listening created so much greater ease for me in every kind of communication, from personal to professional to my global purpose."
Joy Perreras
Leadership Development Practitioner
"Theory U does not just teach you how to do things. It also teaches you how to do the right things. In 35 years across organizations, I found it has something very special for all of us."
Rajeev Bhadauria
Advisor - Corporate Affairs & PR

What Opens Up After ODeX

The ODeX Alumni Network —
where the journey continues

About the Network

A lifelong community of
extraordinary leaders

The ODeX Alumni Network connects graduates of the flagship journey across industries and geographies. It is designed for leaders who want the conversation, challenge, and implementation support to continue beyond the formal cohort.

Connect with fellow ODeX graduates across industries and geographies
Access exclusive resources, frameworks, and implementation tools
Participate in alumni-only events, workshops, and masterclasses
Continue your growth journey with peer coaching and group support
Share your transformation story and inspire the next cohort

Join the Extraordinary Organizations Movement

The alumni portal is exclusively available to graduates of the ODeX program. Sign in to access the full community, or enroll in the next ODeX cohort to begin your journey.

Step Two | Flagship Journey

When leaders are ready for serious transformation

ODeX is the more rigorous next chapter: a six-month journey for founders, CEOs, directors, and senior leaders who want to redesign the organization rather than solve one problem at a time.

For Entrepreneurs, Founders, CEOs, Directors, and Senior Leaders

You built something great.
Now build something extraordinary.

ODeX is a six-month high-touch leadership journey for builders who know the next leap in growth will not come from working harder inside the current paradigm. We help leaders reimagine strategy, culture, leadership, and talent together, co-create a more powerful future, and translate that future into measurable execution inside the organization.

30+ Years of transformational experience
50K+ Trained & Coached
500+ Trainers, Coaches & Educators Trained & Certified
Join the Next Cohort View ODeX Brochure See Video & Written Testimonials

Why ODeX and why now?

Most mid-size organizations do not plateau because of market forces alone. They plateau because invisible ceilings form in leadership, culture, strategy, and talent. ODeX is built for leaders who know the next leap requires a new worldview, not just more effort inside the current one.

01

"We work hard, but we are not growing the way I know we should."

ODeX helps leaders see where growth is constrained by deeper organizational design issues rather than isolated surface problems.

02

"My best people are not reaching their potential, and neither is the organization."

The program helps shift from managing talent as a resource to partnering with people as builders of an extraordinary future.

03

"I feel isolated at the top. Big decisions do not get enough depth."

ODeX creates a serious peer-learning environment where leaders challenge each other, support each other, and grow together.

What this journey helps leaders work on

Breaking growth ceilings rooted in leadership, culture, and weak strategic alignment.

Moving from insight to implementation through live application, reflection, and disciplined action.

ODeX Framework

See the extraordinary organization journey as one integrated system

The ODeX framework brings together long-term thinking, disciplined execution, leadership transformation, culture transformation, breakthrough competitive strategy, and talent partnership into one coherent growth journey.

Guided by Manoj Onkar

Vision to implementation, with leadership depth at the center

ODeX is facilitated with a strong bias toward real organizational application. Leaders are challenged to dream bigger, think more systemically, and translate insight into disciplined action.

Core Transformation Themes Inside ODeX

The journey helps leadership teams move from isolated improvements to deeper organization-wide transformation.

Leadership Transformation
Shift from heroic individual leadership toward collective leadership that can hold larger purpose, faster learning, and bolder execution.
Culture Transformation
Make culture visible, deliberate, and executable so it becomes a force multiplier rather than an invisible drag on growth.
Breakthrough Strategy
Clarify the distinctive strategic game your organization must play to build lasting relevance and stronger competitive advantage.
Strategy Execution
Translate strategic intent into aligned action so teams stop pulling in different directions and start playing one common game.
Talent Partnership
Move beyond managing people as resources and build a system that unlocks potential, ownership, and stronger contribution.
Benefits & Outcomes
What leaders and organizations begin to build through ODeX

These are some of the most important shifts the journey is designed to create in leadership quality, organizational clarity, culture, and execution.

Unified Leadership Game

One company, one direction, and a stronger shared game across the leadership team.

10X Growth Vision

A new worldview where breakthrough growth starts to feel realistic rather than theoretical.

Executable Culture

The mindset, skill set, and tool set needed to build and sustain an extraordinary culture.

Competitive Clarity

Sharper understanding of where you play, how you win, and what makes you meaningfully different.

Talent Partnership

A stronger way of unlocking human potential so growth is not bottlenecked at the top.

Recommended Reading

Built on world-class thinking, not surface-level inspiration

ODeX draws from foundational works in Theory U, competitive strategy, execution, systems thinking, and extraordinary organization design. Participants engage with frameworks that help shift mindset, sharpen strategic judgment, and deepen implementation capability.

Pathway One

Open Cohort

Join a serious learning cohort of entrepreneurs, founders, CEOs, and senior leaders from different organizations who are ready to challenge assumptions, think more systemically, and grow through powerful peer dialogue.

Pathway Two

In-House Leadership Team Journey

Bring the same ODeX depth into your own organization when you want the leadership team to work on one live context, one future, and one real transformation agenda together.

Hear Participant Voices Explore the Brochure Visit ODeX Website
Program Structure
July 2026 to Dec 2026 · 6-Month Rigorous Hands-On Intervention
01
6 Deep Learning Weekends
One immersive weekend every month for deep learning, powerful reflection, rich dialogue, and serious organizational re-imagining.
02
18 Group Coaching Sessions
Weekly two-hour Zoom sessions to digest the learning, work through live challenges, and convert insight into implementation.
03
Dedicated Support Teams
Small peer teams that create accountability, challenge, continuity, and support throughout the six-month journey.
04
Live Project Support
Implementation support for a real organizational initiative so the journey creates measurable change, not just inspiration.

Cancellation & Refund Policy

Message on WhatsApp View LinkedIn Profile

Site Policies

Important details before you engage with us

Privacy Policy

We respect your privacy and use the information you share only to respond, support your inquiry, and deliver relevant Management Innovations services.

We may collect the information you submit on this website, including your name, email, phone or WhatsApp number, organization, and inquiry details.
We use this information to respond to your request, share relevant program details, schedule discussions, and support program or consulting delivery.
We do not sell personal data. Limited information may be shared with trusted service providers only when needed to operate our website, communications, or delivery systems.
We apply reasonable administrative and technical safeguards to protect personal information and retain data only as long as necessary for business or legal purposes.
If you would like your information updated or removed, you may write to manoj@managementinnovations.co.in.

Cancellation and Refund

We aim to be clear and fair about cancellations before any workshop, cohort, or consulting engagement begins.

If Management Innovations cancels a program, the amount paid for that program will be refunded within 30 days of cancellation.
Fees paid by clients or participants are non-refundable and non-transferable in all other cases unless a separate written agreement explicitly states otherwise.
Requests to reschedule, substitute participants, or transfer seats may be considered at our discretion when communicated in advance.
Customized consulting and in-house programs follow the commercial terms defined in the approved proposal, invoice, or engagement document.

Program Delivery Terms

Program design and delivery may be refined to suit the context of the client, the cohort, and the intended learning outcomes.

Workshops, seminars, coaching, and consulting services may be delivered online, in person, or in a hybrid format as agreed.
Dates, faculty, venue, and session sequence may change when required, with reasonable notice to participants or clients.
Programs may be delivered by Manoj Onkar and/or Management Innovations faculty, coaches, or partner experts, depending on the engagement design.
This website provides general information. Final commitments, scope, and deliverables are governed by the confirmed proposal or enrollment communication.
